LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROSEMARY O'CONNOR'S MOTION TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS BOTH PROCEDURALLY DEFECTIVE AND, EVEN IF CONSIDERED, LACKS ANY SUPPORT FOR THE REQUEST THAT THE CASE BE DISMISSED. THE COURT HAS NO AUTHORITY TO GRANT MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Vacated

Notice And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances - Court adopted its tentative ruling PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions is granted, unopposed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Ernst Halperin Judge Pro Tem, not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2011 Set For Trial On Apr-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Mtn To Dismiss With Prejudice
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBIN D. HART, TEL. NO. (510) 273-2435 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ROSEMARY O' CONNOR, TEL. NO. 903-1998, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ROSEMARY O'CONNOR'S Motion To Dismiss With Prejudice IS Denied. The motion is both procedurally defective and, even if considered, lacks any support for the request that the case be dismissed. THE COURT HAS NO AUTHORITY TO GRANT MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Continued To Dec-23-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBIN D. HART, TEL. NO. (510) 273-2435 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ROSEMARY O' CONNOR, TEL. NO. 902-5404, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ROSEMARY O'CONNOR'S Motion To Dismiss With Prejudice IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 6, 2011. COPIES OF ALL PAPERS WERE RECEIVED IN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077
